text.message: I'm happy to go down to 4 9 11
just wanted to make sure I got some sort of expansion

but I thought it was either 8 3 4
didn't expect black to go there
Why is black not a bot?
oh, that was a bot placement
thought he was excited about the wood port
4 9 11 up was there for him if he was here
I’ve been robbed multiple times too mate
Just been a lot of 7’s and we have a bot
I needed the sheep to settle or I was stuck
Your setup is goated red stop it
You are right I shouldn’t have traded brick anyway
it's you or the bot. and we're not stealing from the bot
guy needs me to get road to win and he blocks my brick
You solo me I solo back

and red doesn't seem to want to win
